backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister with user profile management (authenticated and guest), premium tier upgrades, and mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that SubscriptionProvider wraps the entire app in App.tsx, ensuring all routes including the guest flow have access to subscription context.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and recent changes across pages, hooks, and components.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'AI Smart Study Planner', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with protected and public routes, wrapping the entire RouterProvider in SubscriptionProvider to ensure subscription context is available everywhere.
frontend/src/components/BottomTabBar.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs (Home, Setup, Focus, Progress, Settings), featuring indigo active indicators, press-scale animations, and rounded top corners.
frontend/src/components/CelebrationAnima: Canvas-based confetti celebration overlay that animates 120 particles with gravity and fade-out over 2 seconds, auto-dismissing and calling onComplete when finished.
A dialog component that prompts guest users to log in with Internet Identity to enable cloud sync, and migrates guest data to their authenticated account on login.
frontend/src/components/ColorThemeSelect: A settings row component that displays a row of color swatch buttons allowing users to select their preferred accent color theme.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout wrapper that renders a sticky header with logo and theme toggle, a scrollable main content area, and a bottom tab bar.
frontend/src/components/PaywallScreen.ts: A modal dialog presenting premium subscription options (monthly/yearly) and a free trial, listing all premium features with pricing UI.
frontend/src/components/PremiumGate.tsx: A gate component that renders its children only if the user has premium access (via backend tier, subscription context, or testing mode), otherwise shows an UpgradePrompt.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects a new authenticated user's name on first login and saves their profile; hidden entirely for guest users.
Displays dismissible alert banners for exams occurring within the next 3 days and for pending study tasks scheduled for today.
frontend/src/components/StatisticsSectio: Renders study statistics including total focus time, session count cards, and a weekly focus activity bar chart using Recharts.
frontend/src/components/StudyInsightsSec: Displays a list of personalized study insight cards with contextual icons and colors, or an empty state prompt if no insights are available yet.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A small icon button that toggles between light and dark themes, showing a sun or moon icon based on the current theme.
frontend/src/components/UpgradePrompt.ts: Renders a premium upgrade prompt UI showing a feature list with the specified feature highlighted, and opens a PaywallScreen modal when the upgrade button is clicked.
frontend/src/contexts/SubscriptionContex: Provides a React context wrapping the useSubscription hook, exposing provider, status, and isPremium values to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCelebrationTrigger: Tracks whether a celebration animation should be shown when daily progress reaches 100%, triggering at most once per day using localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useCloudSync.ts: Manages cloud sync state, showing a sign-in prompt for guest users or simulating a sync operation and persisting the last-synced timestamp for authenticated users.
frontend/src/hooks/useColorTheme.ts: Manages color theme selection and persistence, applying OKLCH CSS custom property overrides to the document root and reacting to dark mode class changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useExamCountdown.ts: Calculates days remaining until an exam date (stored in nanoseconds), returning whether the exam is today, in the future, or in the past.
frontend/src/hooks/useFocusStats.ts: Tracks and persists total focus minutes and session count in localStorage, exposing helpers to add minutes and increment session count.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestMode.ts: Manages guest mode state and a persistent device ID in localStorage, providing enter/exit callbacks for toggling guest mode.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestToAuthMigrati: Provides a callback to migrate a guest session to an authenticated session by clearing the guest mode flag, with a placeholder for future data merging.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status states.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalDailyProgress: Computes daily task completion percentage from a list of DailyTask objects and persists the result to localStorage, resetting when the date changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStreak.ts: Custom hook that manages a daily study streak counter in localStorage, incrementing on first task completion each day and resetting if a day is missed.
frontend/src/hooks/usePaywallTrigger.ts: Custom hook that tracks whether a paywall should be shown based on task completion and dismissal state, both persisted in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/usePremiumTestingMode: Custom hook that toggles a premium testing mode flag, persisting its state in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend interactions (user profile, exams, tasks, progress), with guest mode fallbacks that bypass the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useStudyInsights.ts: Custom hook that reads streak, focus session, and progress data from localStorage and returns an array of personalized study insight messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscription.ts: Custom hook that manages subscription tier state (free, trial, monthly, yearly) with localStorage persistence and exposes a provider interface for subscription actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom hook that manages light/dark theme state, syncing with localStorage and toggling the 'dark' class on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useWeeklyActivity.ts: Custom hook that derives Mon–Sun focus-minute activity data from a localStorage weekly log, and exports a utility to log focus minutes for the current day.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for the indigo-based light and dark color themes along with utility classes and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page showing today's study tasks, exam countdown, streak, and daily progress for the active exam. Handles task completion toggling, paywall triggering, guest mode, and celebration animations.
frontend/src/pages/ExamSetup.tsx: Form page for creating a new exam study plan with name, date, daily hours, subjects, and topics. Locks additional exam creation behind a premium paywall for non-premium users.
frontend/src/pages/FocusMode.tsx: Pomodoro-style focus timer page with work/break phase toggling, circular SVG progress indicator, and session tracking. Records completed focus minutes to local stats and weekly activity logs.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Landing/login page that offers Internet Identity authentication or guest mode entry. Displays app branding, feature highlights, and a premium badge.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressTracking.tsx: Analytics page displaying weekly study progress via a bar chart, streak card, stat cards, and premium-gated study insights. Fetches exam and weekly progress data and handles loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page component that renders user profile info, theme toggle, cloud sync, premium status, and logout controls using card-based layout with reusable SettingsCard and SettingsRow sub-components.
frontend/src/types/features.ts: Defines the PremiumFeature union type, FeatureConfig interface, and a FEATURE_CONFIG record mapping each premium feature to its display name, description, and icon, plus an ALL_PREMIUM_FEATURES array.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, store, retrieve, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, font families, and keyframe animations, with dark mode via class and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 17) describing the AI Smart Study Planner app's features, architecture, known issues, and implementation status across frontend and backend components.
